title: chromolaena farinosa
intro: Chromolaena farinosa, also known as American Boneset or Eupatorium farinaceum, is a flowering plant native to the Americas, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, infections, and fever. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Chromolaena farinosa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma.
